subcodes.first_line: I know not, O my God, by what call Thou hast attracted the hearts of them that love Thee, and from what fire Thou hast ignited the hearts of Thy chosen ones [3.5s]... ...I swear by Thy glory, O my God! I am astonished at them and at that which they have manifested in the path of Thy love
subcodes.first_line_orig: لم ادر یا الهی بای ندآء اجذبت قلوب محبیک و من ای نار اصطلیت افئده مصطفیک
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
